headline: Assurant Board of Directors Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.88 per Common Share
summary: ATLANTA, May 21, 2026--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a global company that redefines the boundaries of protection – safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, automobiles, and commercial equipment in partnership with the world’s most successful brands, announced today that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share of common stock. The dividend will be payable on June 29, 2026 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on June 8, 2026.
